caption: A man with short dark hair and a light-colored shirt is visible in the upper right corner of a computer screen. The screen displays a web browser running Google Chrome, with the tab "Activities" active. The main content of the page shows a dark-themed interface containing lines of log data. Legible text includes "Scalabel 30003099/google-forgetting-folder/Log-view" and repeated entries of log timestamps such as "2020-10-08 09:08:14". As the sequence progresses, the user interacts with the interface, causing a sidebar to appear on the right side of the screen. This sidebar contains a "Common entries" section and a "Log details" section, with the latter displaying parsed data including "Parsed fields:" and "client: '107.0.1.7'". The man remains in the corner of the screen while the contents of the log viewer are navigated and detailed views are opened.
